nodalDepartmentName.label: Women and Child Development Department, Puducherry

schemeContent.briefDescription: The Government of Puducherry introduced Old Age And Destitute Pension Scheme to extend a helping hand by way of monthly financial assistance to Old Age Persons/Widows/ Deserted Women/ Unmarried Women and Enuches so that they could defray some petty personal expenses without depending on others.
schemeContent.detailedDescription_md:
The Government of Puducherry introduced Old Age And Destitute Pension Scheme to extend a helping hand by way of monthly financial assistance to Old Age Persons/Widows/ Deserted Women/ Unmarried Women and Enuches so that they could defray some petty personal expenses without depending on others.
> Amount of assistance


- ₹1500/- per month for Old Age Persons, Destitute women, Widows, and Transgender with age less than 60 years.
- ₹2000/- per month for Old Age Persons, Destitute women, Widows, and Transgender with age between 60 years and 79 years.
- ₹3000/- per month for Old Age Persons, Destitute women, Widows, and Transgender with age 80 years and above.
schemeContent.benefits_md:
- ₹1500/- per month for Old Age Persons, Destitute women, Widows, and Transgender with age less than 60 years.
- ₹2000/- per month for Old Age Persons, Destitute women, Widows, and Transgender with age between 60 years and 79 years.
- ₹3000/- per month for Old Age Persons, Destitute women, Widows, and Transgender with age 80 years and above.

children.text: The Government of Puducherry introduced Old Age And Destitute Pension Scheme to extend a helping hand by way of monthly financial assistance to Old Age Persons/Widows/ Deserted Women/ Unmarried Women and Enuches so that they could defray some petty personal expenses without depending on others.
₹1500/- per month for Old Age Persons, Destitute women, Widows, and Transgender with age less than 60 years.
₹2000/- per month for Old Age Persons, Destitute women, Widows, and Transgender with age between 60 years and 79 years.
₹3000/- per month for Old Age Persons, Destitute women, Widows, and Transgender with age 80 years and above.
₹1500/- per month for Old Age Persons, Destitute women, Widows, and Transgender with age less than 60 years.
₹2000/- per month for Old Age Persons, Destitute women, Widows, and Transgender with age between 60 years and 79 years.
₹3000/- per month for Old Age Persons, Destitute women, Widows, and Transgender with age 80 years and above.
The Deputy Director (Social Defence), Old Age Pension Section, Department of Women and Child Development, Puducherry.
The Child Development Project Officer, Karaikal.
The selection is periodical and depends on the vacancies and on the availability of funds.
In case of delay whom to contact?
The Director, Department of Women and Child Development, Sithankudi, Puducherry.

applicationProcess.process_md:
> Whom to Apply


- Puducherry: The Deputy Director (Social Defence), Old Age Pension Section, Department of Women and Child Development, Puducherry.- Karaikal: The Child Development Project Officer, Karaikal.- Mahe/Yanam: The Welfare Officer, Mahe/ Yanam.
> Processing Time


- The selection is periodical and depends on the vacancies and on the availability of funds.

> In case of delay whom to contact?


- Puducherry: The Director, Department of Women and Child Development, Sithankudi, Puducherry.- Karaikal: The Collector, Karaikal.- Mahe/Yanam: The Regional Administrator, Mahe/Yanam.

eligibilityCriteria.eligibilityDescription_md:
1. Old Age both men and Women above fifty-five years.
1. Widows above 18 years of age.
1. Deserted Women consecutively deserted for the past seven years.
1. Unmarried Women above 40 years.
1. Transgender above 21 years.

children.text: Old Age both men and Women above fifty-five years.
Deserted Women consecutively deserted for the past seven years.
